message:
feat(node): trust revoke/quarantine/sync CLI commands + extension registry CLI + E2E tests

Trust CLI extensions (main.rs):
- trust revoke: Mark extension as revoked by name, setting RevocationStatus to
  Revoked with reason, quarantining the extension, and emitting a trust card
  mutation event. Includes risk assessment update and reputation trend decay.
- trust quarantine: Apply quarantine by SHA-256 artifact scope, finding all
  trust cards referencing the artifact hash and quarantining them. Reports
  affected card count and IDs.
- trust sync --force: Force-synchronize trust card registry, reporting summary
  counts of total cards, revoked, and quarantined extensions.

Extension registry CLI (main.rs):
- registry search: Search signed extension registry by query string with
  optional --min-assurance filter (1-5 scale). Renders tabular results with
  assurance level, extension name, version, and status.
- registry publish: Build publish request from local package artifact with
  SHA-256 content hash. Derives stable kebab-case name from filename,
  generates 128-char hex signature stub for the initial version entry.
- Helper functions: parse_min_assurance(), extension_assurance_level(),
  search_registry_entries(), render_registry_search_results(),
  build_registry_publish_request(), registry_cli_registry()

New imports: sha2::Digest, supply_chain extension_registry types
(ExtensionSignature, ExtensionStatus, ProvenanceAttestation, etc.),
additional trust_card types (ReputationTrend, RiskAssessment, TrustCardMutation)

Unit tests (main.rs, +80 lines):
- registry_command_tests module: parse_min_assurance range validation,
  assurance level ordering (active > revoked), search filtering by query
  and assurance, empty results rendering, publish request metadata derivation

E2E tests (trust_cli_e2e.rs, +58 lines):
- trust_revoke_marks_target_as_revoked: verifies CLI output includes extension
  ID, revocation status, and quarantine flag
- trust_revoke_fails_for_unknown_extension: verifies error on missing trust card
- trust_quarantine_supports_sha256_artifact_scope: verifies artifact-scoped
  quarantine reports affected card count
- trust_sync_reports_summary_counts: verifies force sync reports card/revoked/
  quarantined counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
